news.headline: Alert: Disclosure of significant ownership stake above 5% in a company, affecting its ownership structure. #shareholding
Viant (NASDAQ: DSP) to present at upcoming investor conferences: Canaccord Genuity on Aug 14th, 2024 in Boston & Citi on Sep 6th, 2024 in NY.
news.summary: Viant Technology Inc., a prominent advertising technology company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol DSP, shared that its management team will be presenting at two investor conferences. The first presentation is set for August 14th, 2024 at 1:00 pm ET at the Canaccord Genuity 44th Annual Growth Conference in Boston, MA. The second presentation will take place at the Citi 2024 Global TMT Conference in New York, NY on September 6th, 2024 at 9:10 am ET. The presentations will be webcast live for interested parties.

news.headline: Arkadium launches third party publishing for game developers, offering access to resources including $1M through APF1 fund.
news.summary: A prominent provider of browser-based games (BBGs), Arkadium, revealed its foray into third-party publishing for game developers, marking a significant shift in its 23-year history. Since the launch of the "Arkadium for Developers" initiative in April 2024, the company has expanded its platform and distribution network. This novel publishing service aims to offer BBG developers access to various resources such as funding, marketing, and support.

news.headline: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:PRG) declares $0.12 dividend per share, payable on Sept 3, 2024, to shareholders of record by Aug 20.
news.summary: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRG), a fintech holding company based in Salt Lake City, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per common stock share. This dividend will be payable on September 3, 2024, to shareholders recorded on August 20, 2024. The company oversees Progressive Leasing, Vive Financial, Four Technologies, and Build. PROG Holdings, Inc. operates in the financial technology sector and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PRG.

news.headline: Alight (NYSE: ALIT) to present at Canaccord Genuity 44th Annual Growth Conference in Boston on August 13,2024 at 9 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Alight (NYSE: ALIT), a prominent cloud-based human capital technology and services company, will have its President, Greg Goff, speaking at the Canaccord Genuity 44th Annual Growth Conference in Boston on August 13, 2024, at 9 a.m. ET. The event will be accessible through a live webcast and replay link. Alight Solutions serves numerous global organizations as a key provider in this sector.

news.headline: Proficient Auto Logistics (NASDAQ: PAL) reports Q2 2024 financial results with total operating revenue of $106.6 million.
news.summary: Proficient Auto Logistics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PAL) based in Jacksonville, Florida, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter ending June 30, 2024. The report encompassed Proficient Auto Logistics, Inc. (“Proficient”), Proficient Auto Transport, Inc. (“Proficient Transport”), and the five Founding Companies collectively. Notable highlights for the second quarter included a Total Operating Revenue of $106.6 million, marking an increase from the same period in 2023.

news.headline: Company's Q2 2024 results are out.
Genetic Technologies Limited is hosting an investor webinar on August 15 at 4:15 p.m. ET. (ASX:GTG; NASDAQ:GENE)
news.summary: Genetic Technologies Limited, a leading company in genomics-based tests for health and serious diseases, is hosting a webinar for investors on August 15, 2024, at 4:15 p.m. ET. The company, known as GTG and traded on ASX as GTG and NASDAQ as GENE, extends the invitation to this webinar to stakeholders interested in its work. Join the session to learn more about the developments in genetic testing and the future prospects of GTG.

news.headline: Yoshitsu Co., Ltd secures US$2.75 million strategic loan from Tasly, a Chinese pharmaceutical conglomerate.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Yoshitsu Co., Ltd ("Yoshitsu" or the "Company") disclosed entering a loan agreement on July 10, 2024. The agreement worth US$2.75 million was made by its Hong Kong subsidiary, Tokyo Lifestyle Limited (“TLS”), with a wholly-owned subsidiary of Tasly (International) Healthcare Investment & Development Company Limited (“Tasly”), a Chinese pharmaceutical conglomerate. Yoshitsu is known for retailing and wholesaling various products like Japanese beauty and health products, sundry items, luxury goods, and electronics in regions including Hong Kong, Japan, North America, and the United Kingdom. The loan is intended to support TLS’s upcoming growth and development.

news.headline: Christopher Heath appointed CEO of MedBright AI. Letter of Intent terminated. Effective August 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on August 9, 2024, MedBright AI Investments Inc. welcomed Christopher Heath as their new Chief Executive Officer. The company operates under the tickers CSE:MBAI, OTCQB:MBAIF, and FSE:Y30.

news.headline: Getty Images reported its Q2 2024 financial results, showing a significant performance on June 30 and trading under symbol GETY.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Getty Images Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GETY) announced their financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2024. Getty Images, a prominent global visual content creator and marketplace, disclosed their performance for this period.

news.headline: Acasti Pharma announces Q1 2025 financial results for quarter ended June 30, 2024, advancing GTX-104 for aSAH.
news.summary: Acasti Pharma Inc., based in Princeton, New Jersey, reported its financial results and business highlights for the quarter ending June 30, 2024, on Aug. 9, 2024. The company, listed as Nasdaq: ACST, is known for advancing GTX-104, a unique injectable form of nimodipine designed to treat aneurysmal subarachnoid hemorrhage (aSAH), a rare disease with high unmet medical needs.

news.headline: Monopar Therapeutics to conduct 1-for-5 reverse stock split on August 12, aiming to meet Nasdaq listing rules compliance.
news.summary: Monopar Therapeutics Inc., a clinical-stage radiopharma company traded on Nasdaq under MNPR, is undergoing a 1-for-5 reverse stock split to address noncompliance with Nasdaq listing rules. This move will consolidate their outstanding shares of common stock, with the Reverse Stock Split set to take effect at 5:00 pm on Monday, August 12, 2024. Following this, the common stock will trade on a split-adjusted basis with a new CUSIP number 61023L207 from Tuesday, August 13, 2024. Monopar aims to refocus its efforts on developing innovative cancer treatments through this strategic financial step.

news.headline: Monopar Therapeutics reports Q2 2024 financials, enrolls patients in MNPR-101-Zr Phase 1 trial, plans MNPR-101 RIT trial in Q4 2024.
news.summary: The first-in-human Phase 1 radiopharmaceutical clinical trial for MNPR-101-Zr has commenced enrollment of patients. The MNPR-101 radio-immuno-therapeutic (RIT) clinical trial is progressing as planned and is set to begin in the fourth quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Sofwave Medical to join 9th Annual MedTech & Diagnostics Conference Aug 12-13, 2024 (TASE: SOFW) CEO and CFO participating.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in SAN CLEMENTE, California, Sofwave Medical Ltd (“the Company”) (TASE: SOFW), a prominent provider of energy-based non-invasive aesthetic medical devices, revealed that Louis Scafuri, the Chief Executive Officer, and Assaf Korner, the Chief Financial Officer, are set to take part in the 9th Annual Needham Virtual MedTech & Diagnostics 1×1 Conference happening on August 12 – 13, 2024. This engagement signifies the Company's proactive involvement in industry events and its focus on networking and collaboration within the sector.

news.headline: LiveOne (NASDAQ: LVO) reaches 3.9M memberships, with Tesla's 26% growth and over 225k new paid members in FY 2025.
news.summary: Tesla's membership has seen a remarkable 26% growth year-over-year. In the fiscal year 2025, there has been a surge in new paid members, exceeding 225,000. Specifically in July 2024, an impressive 64,000 new paid members were added. The total membership has increased by 23% year-over-year. The Business-to-Business (B2B) pipeline has also expanded significantly, now consisting of 63 partners, with four signed partnership deals slated to be announced at the launch.

news.headline: Hurco partners with Kawasaki Robotics for robotic machine-tending solutions at 2024 IMTS in Chicago.
news.summary: At the upcoming 2024 International Manufacturing Technology Show (IMTS) in Chicago, Illinois, companies will showcase interactive, no-code robotic machine tending demos at booth numbers 236520 and 338319. These turnkey demonstrations offer a hands-on experience for attendees to witness cutting-edge automation technology in action. Visit these booths to learn more about the latest advancements in the industry and see the future of manufacturing up close.

news.headline: Firm Capital Mortgage Investment Corp reports Q2/2024 results, declares October and November dividends. Financials for 6 months ended June 30, 2024 released.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Toronto, Firm Capital Mortgage Investment Corporation, listed on the TSX under symbols FC, FC.DB.H, FC.DB.I, FC.DB.J, FC.DB.K, and FC.DB.L, disclosed its financial results for the first half of the year ending June 30, 2024.

news.headline: NeurAxis announces Q2 2024 financial results. Conference call today at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled for today, Friday, August 9, at 9:00 am Eastern Time (ET).

news.headline: Telos Corp beats guidance with $28.5M revenue, 34.1% GAAP Gross Margin, and 42.0% Cash Gross Margin in Q2 2024.
news.summary: Telos Corporation (NASDAQ: TLS), a renowned provider of cybersecurity, cloud, and enterprise security services for top security-focused entities, disclosed its financial outcomes for Q2 2024 in Ashburn, Virginia on August 9, 2024.

news.headline: CBL Properties posts strong Q2 2024 results. GAAP financials for 3 months and 6 months are disclosed. Non-GAAP measures included.
news.summary: CBL Properties (NYSE: CBL) released its second quarter results for the period ending June 30, 2024, in Chattanooga, Tenn. The financial statements were prepared in conformity with GAAP. Further information on non-GAAP financial measures and their reconciliation to GAAP measures can be found at the conclusion of the announcement. The results were as follows: Three Months Ended June 30 and Six Months Ended June 30.

news.headline: Chaotic election spurs high betting volumes, uncertain future for political betting in U.S.
news.summary: The political betting industry in the United States is facing uncertainty despite significant bets and high volumes. The future of this industry is unclear, with key numbers indicating a sense of ambiguity surrounding its continuation.

Dycom Industries (NYSE: DY) to host Q2 results call on Aug 21, 2024, at 9:00 am ET. Press release to precede call.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, Dycom Industries, Inc. (NYSE: DY) announced that they will be conducting a conference call to review their fiscal 2025 second quarter performance. The call is scheduled for August 21, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Prior to the call, Dycom will release a press statement with their results on the same day. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in this discussion about the company's quarterly performance.

news.headline: New in Albuquerque: LGI Homes launches 2 communities. Great news for the housing market! #realestate #growth
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 7.5%, marking a rise of 2.3% compared to the previous year. This surge is mainly attributed to the economic repercussions of the ongoing global pandemic, which has resulted in the loss of approximately 2.1 million jobs. Furthermore, the study highlighted that the youth unemployment rate stands at a concerning 17.8%, indicating the challenges faced by younger individuals in securing employment opportunities. Experts suggest that government intervention and policies are crucial in addressing these issues and revitalizing the job market.

news.headline: Urbana Corp. submits Q2 2024 financials.
Ukraine exchanges offers to holders of outstanding securities issued by Ukraine and the state agency for the restoration and development of infrastructure.
AMD stock rose after Q2 earnings report, expected to gain market share in PCs and servers. Consider buying.
news.summary: The value of AMD's stocks has increased due to anticipated growth in market share within the PC and server processor sectors. Additionally, AMD is also considered a key player in the AI chip market. Investors are now pondering whether to invest in AMD following the release of the company's Q2 earnings report.

news.headline: Bitcoin price surpasses $60,000 as institutional investors drive the rebound. Spot bitcoin ETFs and miners see surge.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin surged past $60,000 on Friday, propelled by the backing of institutional investors. This rise also saw a notable increase in spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and Bitcoin mining companies. These developments marked a significant rebound for Bitcoin, following a period of outflows.

news.headline: Bitcoin's $60K key level; DonAlt warns about trend changes for BTC, Ethereum, and Solana in latest analysis.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency analyst DonAlt recently discussed Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL) in his market analysis. He highlighted the significance of key levels and potential scenarios for their near-term price movements. DonAlt noted that Bitcoin's monthly chart is currently crucial, with $61,000 identified as a critical level to monitor. He suggested that a close above this level could indicate a bullish trend, while a close below might signal a bearish trend similar to the false breakout seen in 2021. When analyzing the weekly timeframe, DonAlt pointed out the presence of lower highs and lower lows, suggesting a downtrend. He emphasized that $60,000 now serves as the decisive level for Bitcoin's direction. In early July, DonAlt had previously mentioned that $60,000 could play a significant role in influencing Bitcoin's price trajectory.

news.headline: Stock futures climb after strong rebound; analysts predict roller coaster ride until upcoming inflation reports. Indices up modestly in early trading, with Nasdaq +0.24%, S&P 500 +0.14%, Dow +0.03%, and R2K +0.40%. VIX fell to 23, yen strengthened, bond yields flat.	SPY rose 0.17% to $531.54, QQQ rose 0.34% to $449.61. Jobless claims decline boosts stocks, easing recession worries. More on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Stocks are looking to end a turbulent week on a positive note as traders maintain an upbeat sentiment. Major index futures are trading slightly higher, with the market expected to consolidate recent gains due to a lack of significant catalysts. The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) fell towards the 23 level, extending its decline from Thursday. The yen strengthened against the dollar, causing some concern among traders. Bond yields are stable, and global markets are following the lead of Wall Street. In premarket trading, the Nasdaq 100 futures rose by 0.24%, S&P 500 by 0.14%, Dow by 0.03%, and R2K by 0.40%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust rose by 0.17% to $531.54, and the Invesco QQQ ETF rose by 0.34% to $449.61. The positive movement follows a standout performance on Thursday, driven by a larger-than-expected decline in jobless claims, positive earnings reports, and weakening of the yen. This data helped allay concerns about the labor market's weakness and potential recession worries. Stocks opened higher, moved sideways, increased in the afternoon, then traded sideways again.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase as market rally continues with Meta leading 15 stocks near buy points. Dow Jones had strong Thursday.
news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones showed a robust performance on Thursday as a new market rally showed promise, although its sustainability remains unconfirmed. Meta and General Electric are fronting the stocks nearing potential buy points, with Meta leading 15 such stocks. This development is detailed in a recent post discussing the rise in Dow Jones Futures and the ongoing market rally that is yet to solidify its strength.

Treasury Bonds - Auction yields - RIKB 27 0415: 0.45%, RIKB 42 0217: 0.65% - successful bond sales.
Ocular Therapeutix™ grants inducement awards to four new employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Bedford, Massachusetts, Ocular Therapeutix, Inc. (NASDAQ:OCUL) disclosed granting inducement awards to four new employees. The company, dedicated to enhancing vision through groundbreaking therapies for retinal ailments and eye conditions, executed this decision to facilitate the employees' recruitment in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Intermap closes final private placement raising undisclosed amount for contracts with Indonesian government, U.S. Air Force, and others.
news.summary: Funds raised from the event will be utilized to fulfill agreements with the Indonesian government, the U.S. Air Force, and various other clients.

news.headline: TenX Keane merger with Citius Oncology approved by shareholders in extraordinary meeting on August 2, 2024.
news.summary: On August 2, 2024, shareholders of TenX Keane approved the merger with Citius Oncology at an extraordinary general meeting. This merger decision was reached through a voting process, with a significant majority of shareholders supporting the merger. The approval from the shareholders marks a crucial step in finalizing the consolidation of TenX Keane and Citius Oncology, a move that is expected to have a substantial impact on both companies and the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Trump-themed 'Restore The Republic' coin's value dropped by 95% to $7.75 million after Eric Trump confirmed it is not official.
news.summary: A newly introduced cryptocurrency called Restore the Republic (RTR) on the Solana blockchain experienced a significant surge in market value, reaching $155 million, amid speculation that it was linked to Donald Trump. However, the value plummeted by 95% after Eric Trump clarified that his father does not have an official cryptocurrency yet. The speculation of Donald Trump's involvement in the cryptocurrency market increased when Eric Trump expressed interest in crypto and DeFi, implying a major announcement. RTR started trading on Thursday and quickly reached a market capitalization of $155 million within a few hours. Ryan Fournier, a conservative activist, added to the rumors by suggesting that the "official Trump coin" was released as Restore the Republic, but later deleted the post.

news.headline: Federal Reserve likely to reject calls for significant rate cut in survey of economists.
China's team in Paris Olympics golf competition sponsored by Biemlfdlkk; "Five-Star Jersey III" created for team.
news.summary: In the upcoming 2024 Paris Olympics, China's National Golf Team is set to compete for medals in the golf competition. The team includes male golfers Yuan Yechun and Dou Zecheng, along with female golfers Yin Ruoning and Lin Xiyu. To mark this momentous event, Chinese brand Biemlfdlkk has crafted the "Five-Star Jersey III" series of Olympic competition attire exclusively for the team. This partnership highlights Biemlfdlkk's reputation as a dependable ally of the Chinese National Golf Team.

news.headline: Canada Carbon completes first phase of Bulk Sample Program for Asbury Graphite Project near Gatineau, Québec.
news.summary: In Toronto, Canada, on August 9, 2024, Canada Carbon Inc. announced the completion of the initial stage of a Bulk Sample Program for its Asbury Graphite Project, entirely owned by the Company. The project is situated 80 kilometers north-northeast of Gatineau, close to Notre-Dame-du-Laus, Québec. Partnering with SGS Lakefield, the Company finalized operations in key sectors. Note that the Company's stock symbols are TSX-V:CCB and FF:U7N1.

news.headline: Draganfly to host shareholder update on Aug 13, 2024 at 5:30pm EST. Stock symbols: NASDAQ: DPRO, CSE: DPRO, FSE: 3U8A.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Saskatoon, SK, Draganfly Inc. disclosed plans for a shareholder update call on August 13th, 2024 at 5:30pm EST. As a renowned drone solutions and systems developer with listings on NASDAQ (DPRO), CSE (DPRO), and FSE (3U8A), Draganfly is set to provide important company updates during the call. This announcement comes as a crucial development for investors and stakeholders interested in the company's progress and strategies.

news.headline: Energy Transfer LP announces secondary public offering of 38,755,996 common units by Selling Unitholders.
news.summary: Energy Transfer LP, a leading partnership (NYSE: ET), has started an underwritten secondary public offering of 38,755,996 common units representing limited partner interests. The offering is being conducted by WTG Midstream LLC and a Stonepeak affiliate, the selling unitholders. They will receive all proceeds from the sale, with Energy Transfer not participating in selling any common units.

news.headline: Extreme Networks to hold investor conferences in August and September 2024 as announced, aiming to discuss the company's performance and future plans.
news.summary: In Morrisville, North Carolina, Extreme Networks revealed their upcoming investor conference schedule for August and September 2024.

news.headline: Pagaya & Castlelake strike deal for Castlelake to buy up to $1B of consumer loans from Pagaya Network.
news.summary: In New York, Pagaya Technologies LTD (NASDAQ: PGY) and Castlelake, L.P. have agreed to a deal where Castlelake will acquire up to a specified amount of assets from Pagaya. Pagaya, a technology firm providing AI-driven financial solutions globally, and Castlelake, specializing in asset-based private credit, are finalizing the agreement with the exact details to be disclosed later. Castlelake, an experienced investor in consumer credit opportunities, aims to strengthen its investment portfolio through this collaboration with Pagaya.

news.headline: Tecnotree reports positive H1 2024 results: Net sales of EUR 34.9 million, 5% growth to EUR 40.8 million in constant currency.
news.summary: Tecnotree, a renowned global provider of digital platforms for AI, 5G, and cloud-native technologies in the telecommunications sector, recently unveiled its H1 2024 financial outcomes, showcasing consistent revenue, favorable free cash flow, expanded product portfolio, and acquisition of new clientele. During the initial half of 2024 (January-June), the company recorded net sales of EUR 34.9 (34.8) million. In constant currency, net sales surged by 5% to EUR 40.8 million. The adjusted operating income amounted to EUR 10.9 (9.8) million.

news.headline: GoPro plans to cut 4% of its workforce, aiming at saving $7.5 million.
McCoy Global reported Q2 2024 revenue of $19.9M, up 23% from last year, with net earnings up by 119% to $3.1M. Quarterly dividend: $0.02 per share.
news.summary: McCoy Global Inc. reported its financial results for the second quarter of 2024, with revenue of $19.9 million, a 23% increase from the previous year. Net earnings saw a significant rise to $3.1 million, up 119% from last year. Adjusted EBITDA stood at $4.7 million, accounting for 24% of revenue. The company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per common share, payable on October 15, 2024. McCoy highlighted advancements in its Digital Technology Roadmap, including the success of test-rig trials for smartCRT™ enhancements. It also secured contracts worth $3.7 million for offshore systems in Latin America and an additional $1.8 million in Brazil. The company's backlog stood at $22.3 million as of June 30, 2024. Despite fluctuations in order intake and revenues, McCoy anticipates future revenue growth driven by technology adoption and market expansion. Gross profit margins improved, with a 34% margin for the quarter. General and administrative expenses decreased, and product development expenditures increased to advance new technologies. Overall, McCoy Global Inc. demonstrated strong financial performance and strategic progress in the second quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Fed hints at potential rate cut in September if inflation remains low, despite unchanged interest rates now.
news.summary: At their recent meeting, Federal Reserve officials decided to keep interest rates steady, suggesting a potential upcoming rate decrease while monitoring inflation and labor market conditions.

news.headline: Neo Performance Materials reported strong Q2 2024 results with $24.2M adjusted EBITDA, $107.5M revenue vs $170.4M in Q2 2023, and increased outlook of $45-50M adjusted EBITDA for fiscal year 2024. Margins improved with a 390 basis point increase to 10.5%. Cash and cash equivalents were $100.5M, with $49.5M in gross debt. Magnequench business unit won new contracts, and Chemicals & Oxides showed progress. Rare Metals had strong performance with a focus on operational improvements. Strategic advisors appointed for review process. Dividend of Cdn$0.10 per share declared for shareholders. Transformative process yielding positive results for Neo.
news.summary: The news article discusses Neo Performance Materials Inc.'s second quarter 2024 financial results. Despite a decline in rare earth prices, Neo reported strong financial results with $24.2 million of Adjusted EBITDA for the six months ended June 30, 2024. This resulted in an increased outlook for fiscal 2024 to $45 million to $50 million of Adjusted EBITDA, a 20% to 35% increase over the prior year. Neo also announced the sale of its majority ownership interest in a facility in Quapaw, Oklahoma. Additionally, a strategic review process was initiated with the appointment of financial advisors. In the second quarter of 2024, Neo's revenue was $107.5 million, down from $170.4 million in the same period in 2023. Operating income for Q2 2024 was $5.8 million and Adjusted EBITDA was $13.4 million. Neo had $100.5 million in cash and $49.5 million in gross debt as of June 30, 2024. The company invested $26.7 million in capital expenditures and distributed $6.2 million in dividends to shareholders in the first half of the year. Neo is focusing on business simplification, operational improvements, and reducing earnings volatility. Magnequench, Chemicals & Oxides, and Rare Metals business units all showed positive performance during the quarter.
